title: Shareholders approve reclassification of Shreyas Shibulal and Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal to public category
detailed_summary: Infosys stated that shareholders approved the reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from the “Promoter and Promoter Group” category to the “Public” category at the 45th Annual General Meeting held on Tuesday, June 23, 2026. The reclassification is effective immediately.

key_facts.fact: Shareholders approved the reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from the category of “Promoter and Promoter Group” to “Public”.
The approval was given at the 45th Annual General Meeting held on Tuesday, June 23, 2026.
The Applicants stand reclassified to “Public” category with immediate effect.

corporate_actions.description: Reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from “Promoter and Promoter Group” to “Public”.
